notes: Nevermined has NO fully-programmatic signup. API key generation requires: (1) browser login to nevermined.app via Privy (social/email/wallet), (2) navigating to Settings > Global NVM API Keys, (3) clicking '+ New API Key'. There is no REST endpoint for account creation or API key generation — the /api/v1/api-keys/register-key endpoint requires a Privy identity token (browser-obtained) or a clientAssertion JWT signed by a pre-existing NVM wallet key. The facilitator also returns on-chain contract addresses (Base Sepolia), confirming crypto infra is core, not optional. Agent registration (POST /api/v1/protocol/agents) requires a bearer token from the above flow. Classification: Tier 3 (human dashboard step required to obtain credential). NOT 'Autonomous signup ✓' — that tag is inaccurate. The verifier uses a pre-provisioned NVM_API_KEY from env. Probe results: GET / → 200 (returns contract addresses), POST /agent without auth → 401. No wallet primitives exist in the current verifier, making autonomous first-time signup a genuine blocker.

steps.description: POST /api/v1/api-keys/validate (auth probe — confirms key is accepted)
GET /api/v1/protocol/agents (list agents owned by this key)

assertions.description: API key authorized to list agents
